component.name: KhaApp
component.summary: Unofficial WhatsApp client for KDE Plasma

description.p: KhaApp is a native WhatsApp client for KDE Plasma, built with Qt6 and Kirigami. It uses a separate background daemon to handle the WhatsApp protocol, communicating with the frontend via D-Bus.
DISCLAIMER: KhaApp is an unofficial, community-developed client and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Meta Platforms, Inc. Use at your own risk.

ul.li: Native KDE Plasma integration with system notifications and tray icon
Text messaging, image, audio and document support
KDE Connect integration for phone connectivity status
Full Kirigami theming with light and dark mode

description.p: First public beta release. See CHANGELOG.md for full details.
